title: Nivolumab-Associated Cardiac Manifestation of Cutaneous T-Cell Lymphoma in a Patient With Concurrent Renal Cell Carcinoma.
publicationName: Mayo Clinic proceedings. Innovations, quality & outcomes
journalName: Mayo Clinic proceedings. Innovations, quality & outcomes
snippet: Cardiac involvement by cutaneous T-cell lymphoma is exceedingly rare and poses considerable diagnostic and therapeutic challenges. Immune checkpoint inhibitors targeting programmed cell death-1 have reported variable activity in T-cell lymphomas and have been associated with paradoxical progression in select cases.
